  - 文件大小：$(wc -c memory/2026-03-13.md | awk '{print $1}') 字节
  - 保存时间：$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")" >> /Users/whh073/.openclaw/workspace-productmanager-agent/memory/2026-03-13.md
